title: Privacy Policy
intro: This Policy describes how personal data of social-media-v1 users is collected, processed, stored and protected.

blocks.text: 1.1. The personal-data operator is sole proprietor Alexei Mozol (reg. no. 12345678, the «Operator»).
1.2. The Policy is developed in accordance with applicable personal-data and advertising law.
1.3. By using the Service the User confirms they have read this Policy and consent to processing of personal data in the described scope.

items: email address (required);
user name (optional);
password — stored only as an irreversible cryptographic hash (bcrypt).

blocks.text: The Operator has no access to the password in plain text. Bank-card details are not collected or stored by the Operator — payment data is passed directly to the payment operator.

2.2. Data when using the Telegram bot: Telegram ID, Telegram username, first and last name from the Telegram profile. Users registered only via Telegram may have no email — notifications are sent via Telegram.

items: login IP address — stored for no more than 90 days, used to protect against unauthorised access;
browser User-Agent — technical browser and OS details;
action audit log — for security and dispute resolution;
device fingerprint — to bind sessions to the account.

blocks.text: 2.4. On support requests: message text, page URL, User-Agent, screen size. On invoice payment: company name, registration number, legal address, invoice email.

items: account registration and authentication;
providing Service functionality per the chosen plan;
billing: payment processing, invoicing, receipts;
transactional notifications (payment, subscription, security);
marketing emails — only with explicit consent;
security and incident investigation;
support and improving the Service on anonymised data.
performance of the contract — for processing needed to provide the Service;
consent of the subject — for marketing emails;
compliance with statutory requirements — for accounting and fiscal records;
legitimate interest of the Operator — for security and fraud prevention.

blocks.text: After account deletion, data whose retention is legally required is kept for the statutory periods.

All personal data is stored on servers located in the Operator's country of registration. No cross-border transfer of personal data is performed. Processors act solely for the purposes of this Policy.
7.1. The Service uses cookies; an informational banner is shown on the first visit.
7.2. Cookies are managed in browser settings. Disabling essential cookies makes authentication impossible.

items: To run the agents the User grants access to social-network channels.
Through that access the Service obtains channel posts and anonymised statistics (impressions, reactions, reach).
The User is solely responsible for the lawfulness of granting the Operator access to channels.
The Operator processes channel data solely to provide functionality to that specific User and does not pass it to third parties.
obtain information about the processing of their data;
obtain a copy of their data;
require correction, blocking or deletion of inaccurate or unlawfully processed data;
withdraw consent for the consent-based part;
opt out of marketing emails;
file a complaint with the competent data-protection authority.

blocks.text: To exercise rights — request to support@social.media. Response time — 30 days.

items: encryption of data in transit (HTTPS/TLS 1.2+);
passwords stored hashed (bcrypt);
access-rights segregation and audit logging;
regular software updates.

blocks.text: On detecting a data breach the Operator notifies the competent authority and affected Users within the periods set by applicable law.

items: Marketing messages are sent only with explicit consent (a separate checkbox at registration, unchecked by default).
Transactional messages are sent without additional consent under the contract.
Opt out in the account «Settings» or via the «Unsubscribe» link in the email.

blocks.text: The current version is always available in the Service. For material changes Users are notified by email or via the account.

items: Sole proprietor Alexei Mozol
Email: support@social.media
Telegram: @socialmedia_bot
